sentences.arabic: أَرَادَ سَعِيدٌ أَنْ يَشْتَرِيَ تَذْكِرَةَ الْحَافِلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Saeed je htio kupiti kartu za autobus.
sentences.translationEn: Saeed wanted to buy a bus ticket.

sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ إِلَى شِبَّاكِ التَّذَاكِرِ وَسَأَلَ عَنِ السِّعْرِ.
sentences.translation: Otišao je na šalter karata i pitao za cijenu.
sentences.translationEn: He went to the ticket window and asked about the price.

sentences.translation: Kupio je kartu u oba smjera.
Sjeo je i mirno čekao autobus.
sentences.translationEn: He sat and waited for the bus calmly.
